name: gigi-harness-server
_phase2_done: @anthropic-ai/sdk removed 2026-05-12 (GATE 5): the only importer was api/ios-computer-use.js, which moved to examples/ios-computer-use-anthropic-sdk.js.legacy. Path 4 now uses the Claude Code CLI subprocess via claude-runner.js → ios-claude-agent.js → /api/ios/agent/claude. This eliminates per-turn API billing and uses the user's Claude Code subscription. Setup wizard + start-harness.sh unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to avoid silent API billing (Issue claude-code#45572).
